headline: Lilly completes acquisition of Centessa Pharmaceuticals to advance treatments for sleep-wake disorders
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE: LLY) today announced the successful completion of its acquisition of Centessa Pharmaceuticals plc. Centessa is a clinical-stage company developing orexin receptor 2 agonists as a new class of medicines for the treatment of narcolepsy and potentially other sleep-wake disorders.

headline: Adding Eli Lilly’s R&D Chief to the Board Might Change The Case For Investing In Illumina (ILMN)
summary: Illumina, Inc. recently expanded its Board from nine to ten members and appointed Daniel M. Skovronsky, M.D., Ph.D., Chief Scientific and Product Officer at Eli Lilly and President of Lilly Research Laboratories, as an independent director effective June 16, 2026. His background in drug discovery, clinical development, and precision medicine across cardiometabolic, immunology, and neuroscience fields aligns closely with Illumina’s push into clinical genomics and multiomics. headline: Abbisko Therapeutics Deepens R&D Collaboration with Lilly
summary: Abbisko Therapeutics Co., Ltd. ("Abbisko Therapeutics" hereafter, HKEX code: 02256.HK) today announced that it has entered into a strategic research collaboration and license agreement with Eli Lilly and Company ("Lilly"), a leading global pharmaceutical company. Under the agreement, the two companies will collaborate on the discovery and development of innovative medicines across multiple targets, advancing novel drug candidates with global potential.
